items.title: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
items.summary: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns; at some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.

items.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
items.summary: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.

items.title: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
items.summary: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.

items.title: Defense tech, AI, and fundraising take center stage at StrictlyVC Los Angeles on June 18
items.summary: On Thursday, June 18, at The Aerospace Corporation Campus, investors, founders, and tech leaders will gather for an evening of conversation exploring some of the most consequential shifts taking place across venture capital, defense tech...

items.title: Meta steals a tactic from Tesla and builds data centers in tents
items.summary: Meta may have found one way to slash its massive data center bill: tents.

items.title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform
items.summary: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.

items.title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI
items.summary: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI

items.title: Meta rolls out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook
items.summary: Creators often have to parse through charts and dashboards to understand their performance, but with the new AI assistant, they can get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and "What are people saying in my comments?"

items.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
items.summary: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

items.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
items.summary: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.

items.title: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
items.summary: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in sales for digital goods.
